case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 1080-1260s productcatalogservice metrics. Severe latency anomalies (dev ~73k) persist across all windows, confirmed by trace self-latency spikes. Implication: productcatalogservice remains the primary root cause.

Final RCA confirms productcatalogservice as primary root cause due to extreme latency anomalies (dev >70k) in metrics, supported by trace propagation. Recommendationservice and checkoutservice show secondary latency impacts.
